heroSubheadline: I design and build clean, mobile-first websites for businesses, NGOs and startups. Fast, accessible and focused on conversion.
aboutPara1: I'm a Web Designer, Front-End Developer, and Software QA Specialist with over 5 years of experience creating stunning digital experiences. My expertise spans web design, front-end development, and quality assurance testing.
aboutPara2: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new design trends, contributing to open-source projects, or mentoring aspiring developers.
